That's what you want to do. And take these 50 people and bring them down the straight line for full blown presentations. That makes sense to everybody? Yes? Okay. Simple as that. This is really what, usually won't happen with a salesman unless the salesman is like self-deluding himself. Like I'm doing great. I'm getting lots of leads, all right? He's riding a wood. But typically this happens when you have a company that's cold calling for you, like in the highest order in the Philippines, and they fill your pipeline with wood. The people are never, they're just almost like sending out brochures. Just take the brochure. Take the brochure. Thanks. And they hang out in the dollar. They wanted a brochure. And that's how it happens to someone else that's working for you. But just be aware, if it's you, always ask yourself, am I shoving this lead down the person's throat or are they really a lead? The amount of time that you waste on the backside of it all is horrific.
